div.p: Invariant: Mode transitions occur ONLY at " (in NORMAL) and // or /* (in NORMAL) — never from within a sub-mode.

tr.td: Only valid entry to string mode
Only valid entry to line comment
Only valid entry to block comment

text.tspan: ⚠ Would trigger IN_LINE_COMMENT if in NORMAL mode
✓ **IN_STRING**: consumed as READING — just a character
✓ Consumed as READING — no mode transition
⚠ Would enter IN_STRING if in NORMAL mode
All chars discarded — no token emission possible

g.text: Result: [ ] (zero tokens — entire input was comment)
